title: CloudHealth by VMware: Secure State. Manages Over 50M Assets from Billions of Events on AWS

description:
Learn how CloudHealth Secure State utilizes Amazon Kinesis Data Streams and Amazon Neptune to manage, process and scale while ingesting millions of assets in their data pipeline on AWS. Sripriya and Marie discuss how Secure State mitigates security and compliance risks for their customers while providing near real-time insights on this data. As a result, customers can leverage a unified graph-based platform to visualize the change in activity from their cloud resource relationships to act quickly on any potential threats or misconfigurations in their architecture.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS​​​ cloud:
http://amzn.to/2ZIbygO​

#AWS #ThisIsMyArchitecture
fulltitle: CloudHealth by VMware: Secure State. Manages Over 50M Assets from Billions of Events on AWS
